params_frozen.design_provenance: Second test in overlay-class (vol-target was #1 and FAILed by levering-into-drawdown on a no-alpha base). Built after options-implied class converged across 4 tests (v7 +2.60 sign-flip artifact, v8 +2.18 model-free, v9A +1.72 sign-constrained, v9D +2.29 cross-sectional residual) on a triangulated +2.2-2.3 honest Carhart αt sub-Bonferroni. v10 thesis: a properly-designed de-lever-only L4 overlay can convert a real-but-marginal αt signal into deploy-grade Sharpe-improvement per ADR 0007 (overlay-class strategies use Sharpe-improvement as primary success metric, NOT Carhart αt). Base scorer is FROZEN as the v9D cross-sectional residual specification (NOT averaged across v7-v9D; mitigates the 'best-of-4 selection effect' adversarial concern).
params_frozen.adversarial_review_summary: Perplexity (sonar-reasoning-pro 2026-05-04) ranked candidate B (this design) #1 of 5 alternatives because (a) acceptance reframe per ADR 0007 doesn't burn alpha-class Bonferroni, (b) Kelly/CPPI/drawdown-control literature post-2020 supports overlay robustness, (c) directionality is asymmetric — PASS shifts deploy-readiness priors sharply, FAIL falsifies L4-on-this-base only. Zen (gemini-3-pro-preview, high thinking) seconded with three hardenings folded in: (1) DISCARD Jobson-Korkie inference (IID-normal broken by skew/kurt/autocorrelation of options-implied portfolios) → use Ledoit-Wolf-style block-bootstrap Sharpe-difference; (2) ADD MaxDD-reduction gate alongside Sharpe-improvement (overlay that smooths vol but doesn't truncate left tail is useless); (3) keep overlay COMPUTATIONALLY DUMB — pure realized-equity-curve drawdown trigger, no macro features, no predictive logic, no leverage. Zen also flagged 'honest +2.2' may be selection effect from 4 prior tests; mitigation = freeze v9D as-spec'd not as best-of-4, plus base-replication consistency gate.

base_scorer.specification: Per-asof OLS residual of −ivp30 against (reversal_1m, momentum_6m, rv_30d) cross-sectionally; long top-decile equal-weighted by residual
base_scorer.modification_during_v10: PROHIBITED — any drift in base spec invalidates the overlay test

overlay_specification.rule_type: step-function on rolling-equity-curve drawdown from peak
overlay_specification.execution_lag: T+1 (scale[t] from returns[<t] only, shift(1) enforced — same causality contract as VolTargeter)
overlay_specification.deviations_from_vol_target_v1: (a) NO leverage permitted (cap=1.0 not 1.5), (b) trigger is realized-drawdown not realized-vol, (c) step function not continuous scaling, (d) recovery threshold prevents whip-saw

params_frozen.data_provider: iVolatility $399 retail tier (probe v5 99.5% T1) — same as v7/v8/v9

phase_audit.rationale: v10 success metric is Sharpe-improvement (not αt), so the dispersion gate uses Sharpe-improvement consistency across phases; loose 0.5 absolute Sharpe units mirrors v9's αt_range gate scale

base_replication_consistency.rule: v10 holdout run of base scorer (same v9D spec, no overlay) must yield αt within ±0.5 of v9D's recorded +2.29
base_replication_consistency.rationale: Guards against silent infrastructure drift between v9D and v10; if base diverges, the overlay test result is uninterpretable

weight_bound_invariant.rule: overlay weight series ∈ [0.0, 1.0] at every t
weight_bound_invariant.rationale: Hard guard against any leverage bug; FAIL aborts run pre-verdict

overlay_active_during_drawdown.rule: during 2018-Q4 + 2020-Q1 in TRAIN-only smoke, overlay weight must drop below 1.0 at some t
overlay_active_during_drawdown.rationale: If overlay never triggers in known drawdowns, the design is mis-specified

periods.rationale: Same train + burnt holdout as v9D base (FROZEN). v10 cannot change the period without breaking the consistency gate.

success_criteria.primary_metric: Sharpe-difference t-stat (Ledoit-Wolf block-bootstrap, block_size=21d, n_bootstrap=10000) on (overlay_net_returns − base_net_returns) holdout series, multi-phase pooled

bonferroni_accounting.rationale: Overlay class uses Sharpe-improvement metric not Carhart αt, so does NOT increment the program-level alpha-class counter (n=24 unchanged). Within overlay class this is test #2 after vol-target. Naive Bonferroni at n=2 → |t|≥2.24, but escalated to t≥2.5 at p<0.01 given burnt-holdout context (zen recommendation).

all_gates_must_pass.rule: Sharpe-difference Ledoit-Wolf block-bootstrap t-stat ≥ 2.5 at p < 0.01
Base-scorer αt in v10 audit replicates v9D's +2.29 within ±0.5
max(overlay weight series) ≤ 1.0 AND min(overlay weight series) ≥ 0.0 at every t

verdict_classification.all_six_pass: PASS — first phase-robust deploy-candidate from project; advance to prospective replication 2026-05-04+. Methodology bundle gets a real example.
verdict_classification.any_gate_fail: FAIL — log to ledger, write postmortem (paradigm failure #11), update docs/research/paradigm_failures_postmortem.md. NO auto-pivot to v11 within same session (anti-HARKing per feedback memo).

kill_pre_full_run: Phase 2 smoke: base in-sample αt < 1.0 → ABORT (base broken, fix before holdout)
Phase 2 smoke: overlay weight constant 1.0 across all t → ABORT (trigger never fires, design mis-specified)
G5 weight-bound violation in any phase → ABORT (hard bug, not a research outcome)
success_criteria.no_stretch_tier: Single multi-gate PASS bar. No exploratory tier; ALL six gates required.
success_criteria.regime_stratification_postdoc: DESCRIPTIVE: report Sharpe-improvement split by VIX>20 vs VIX<20 sub-periods. Not a gate.
success_criteria.capital_deploy_clause: Capital deploy OFF-TABLE on this burnt holdout regardless of any verdict per program-level burnt-holdout policy. PASS triggers prospective walk-forward Sharpe-improvement replication on data accruing post-2026-04-30 at p<0.05 single-test before any escalation.
